suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 launch readiness and Interop coordination
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 targeted for Friday April 25 (first day of Interop) with merged ePBS+BAL. Critical to confirm client readiness and Kurtosis config status after cancelling ePBS DevNet 2.
Proposal window opened after FOCIL selection but end date remains TBD based on Glamsterdam progress. Need clear timeline now that DevNet 0 launch is imminent.

suggestions.topic: 4788 gap handling for empty payloads impact on staking protocols
suggestions.rationale: Stokes was assigned to contact Lido, Rocketpool, and EigenLayer on 4788 impact in ACDC #176 but no follow-up reported. Protocols prefer backfilling; need confirmation this is resolved before mainnet.

suggestions.topic: Execution request optimization PR status and timeline
suggestions.rationale: Decision made to defer optimization and merge PR 5094 with duplicated requests, but Nico Flaig was assigned to open optimization PR. Clarify if this remains on roadmap or permanently deferred.

suggestions.topic: Native account abstraction breakout session outcomes
suggestions.rationale: Breakout scheduled for April 23 at 15:00 UTC with roadmap review. Since call #178 is after this date, report outcomes and any implications for Hegotá planning.

suggestions.topic: Partial slot proofs remaining client implementations
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #173 noted Lighthouse/Prism had implementations in devnet but Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus were assigned completion. Decision made that ePBS cannot ship without this in all clients, but no updates since January.

suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet 3/4 status and path to SFI
suggestions.rationale: DevNets 3 and 4 targeted for Thursday/Friday April 18/19. Provide update on stability and discuss SFI criteria (was deferred to ACDE March 26 but not confirmed resolved).
